segments.seg0: Gentlemen, I have breached the Webb Industries database
segments.seg1: and as of this moment, you're both upper middle management.
segments.seg2: I'm sure you'll blend right in.

segments.seg0: Your IDs will only take you as far as the Executive Floors.
segments.seg1: That's where the real challenge begins.
segments.seg2: Your final destination is an impregnable,
segments.seg3: self-contained structure atop the main building known as the Perch.
segments.seg4: I believe this is where the company stores its data.

segments.seg0: That's just it. The place is an information black hole.
segments.seg1: No blueprints, no infrastructure, nothing.
segments.seg2: Have I mentioned that this is a terrible idea?
segments.seg3: I need to notify M.

segments.single: Code white. Webb's deleting all the evidence.
Chin up, Moneypenny. We're not leaving without answers.
What can you tell us about the Perch?
Negative. M is need-to-know only. Her protection, not ours.
I don't feel so good, actually.

segments.seg0: I'm between ID numbers, tech issues.
segments.seg1: IT is sorting me out.

segments.seg0: You first.
segments.seg1: If indeed you are who you say you are.

segments.single: That won't last. Call me a cynic.
Will you deal with this clod or should I?
Really? I'd think he was over the moon, newly married and all.
Say, I didn't catch your name.
Right. And your company ID number?

segments.seg0: Really?
segments.seg1: He does seem to be taking well to the treatments,
segments.seg2: but never better.

segments.single: Say, I didn't catch your name.

segments.seg0: Right.
segments.seg1: And your company ID number?

segments.single: I'm a glass half full kind of guy.

segments.seg0: Oh. Well, my department works closely with the CSO's office,
segments.seg1: and I don't recall seeing you before.

segments.seg0: I see.
segments.seg1: You must work closely with McKenzie.
segments.seg2: How's he doing? Haven't seen him all week.

segments.seg0: Security officers.

segments.single: Burning the midnight oil. You work at the Perch?
Poaching staff from your business partners. Bad form...
Over the top would be more fitting.
Wonder what the company ethos has to say about assassination.
Greenway... I found the corporate ladder.
The Perch gate is right through here.
As long as you can look yourself in the mirror.
Well, they do say life is not a competition.
Cambridge man. Bet he wears the socks.

Damien and the Murtos go a long way back.
Isola's been laying it on rather thick.

segments.seg0: Roger Finch, chief legal officer.
segments.seg1: Hope he doesn't sue.

segments.seg0: Isola Vale. Senior crisis manager.
segments.seg1: Dare say she'll be "seeking new challenges"...

segments.seg0: Damien Webb's office.
segments.seg1: I was expecting a lair of bones.

segments.single: Not yet. Better fetch the old man.
Yes... at least those pills have kicked in.
Are you thinking what I'm thinking?
Yeah... should've asked Q for a grapple gun.

Hey, you can't be in here!
Oi! Who did this? Show yourself!
Yeah... should've asked Q for a grapple gun.
How did I miss that? Be right there.
Bond. I think you can climb that library to the access window.
I suspect we'll know soon enough.

segments.seg0: You didn't seem too surprised about the bodies.
segments.seg1: Something you're not telling me, Bond?

segments.single: Type of prison he's going to, I'd say it's pretty much mandatory.
You think they allow top hats and monocles in prison?
All he needs now is a top hat and a monocle.
Bond, over here. I found a way through.
Bond, get the keycard. Hurry up.
Over here. Give me a hand.
Are you enjoying the scenery? Get a move on.
The lobby is on the right. Almost there.
How do you know it's a her?
Not exactly subtle. She a friend of yours?

segments.seg0: So, all we need to get through the door is
segments.seg1: get through the door. Leave it to me.

segments.single: No, they took it. But look... there's a dozer on the other side.
Breathing. But come morning, he'll wish he wasn't.
Seems like we're not the only gatecrashers.
Anyway, you were saying? About what happened after you left the pub.
Anyway, you were saying? About tonight's ambush.
You want smoke up your arse, Bond, join the Americans.

segments.seg0: It got a bit hairy after that.
segments.seg1: If the sling hadn't thrown them,
segments.seg2: I might have actually needed your help.
